return(function(h,v,Z,K,t,E,N,z,k,s,y,i,d,w,X,c,r,F,C,H,n,e)s,i,y,n,X,H,e,r,F,d,k,C,c,w,z=function(h)i[h]=i[h]-(-660441-(-660442))if i[h]==769563+-769563 then i[h],n[h]=nil,nil end Q,r=199464-199463,h[-251946-(-251947)]while r do i[r],Q=i[r]-(487981+-487980),Q+(-398206-(-398207))if i[r]==82533+-82533 then i[r],n[r]=nil,nil end r=h[Q]end end,function(h,Q)local v=C(Q)local
